final_prompt.prompt:
Design a minimalist logo for a mobile app called "Spritr".

风格/媒介: flat design, vector, clean lines, high contrast
构图: centered composition, icon + logotype combination
主体: a sleek modern bottle being opened, with liquid splash forming a subtle flame or energy wave
场景/背景: dark background — black or deep purple
光线/氛围: trendy, youthful, high-energy nightlife vibe
色彩方案: dark background (black or deep purple) with neon accents — electric blue, pink, or green
材质/纹理:
文字(原样):
约束: no text, icon-only; bold modern sans-serif futuristic feel carried through the icon shape
避免: photorealism, gradients, drop shadows, decorative clutter
